zh.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可阿特萊包盧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Mortimer於1377年出生在英國諾福爾可阿特萊包盧時，她的父親Thomas de Mortimer54歲，母親Margery Byron50歲。她和John FitzRandolph至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Attleborough, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可阿特萊包盧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Mortimer于1377年出生在英国諾福爾可阿特萊包盧时，她的父亲Thomas de Mortimer54岁，母亲Margery Byron50岁。她和John FitzRandolph至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Mortimer was born in 1377, in Attleborough, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas de Mortimer, was 54 and her mother, Margery Byron, was 50. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with John FitzRandolph.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Mortimer est née en 1377, à Attleborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Mortimer, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margery Byron, avait 50 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec John FitzRandolph.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Mortimer 1377 in Attleborough, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Mortimer 54 und ihre Mutter Margery Byron 50. Sie hatte mit John FitzRandolph mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Mortimer è nata il nel 1377 nel Attleborough, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Thomas de Mortimer, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Margery Byron, aveva 50 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con John FitzRandolph.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Mortimerが1377年にイギリスノーフォルクアットレボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas de Mortimerは54歳，母Margery Byronは50歳であった。彼女はJohn FitzRandolphとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Mortimer(이)가 1377년 영국 노르폴크 애틀레버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Mortimer(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Byron(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 John FitzRandolph(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Mortimer nasceu em 1377, em Attleborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Mortimer, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margery Byron, tinha 50 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com John FitzRandolph.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Mortimer родилась в 1377 г. в местности аттлебороую, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Mortimer было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Byron, 50. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от John FitzRandolph.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Mortimer nació en 1377, en Attleborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Mortimer, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margery Byron, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con John FitzRandolph.
